name: Education
description: Workflow templates for reviewing public education pages and sample learning workflows.
responsible_use: Use only public pages or pages where permission was granted.
Do not submit real personal data.
Stop before final submission/payment unless explicitly testing a local sample page.

workflows.name: Submit assignment
workflows.description: A student tries to find an assignment, complete required fields, and reach the submission step.
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Access learning resources
workflows.description: A student tries to find and open course readings, documents, or resource links.
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Watch video lesson
workflows.description: A student tries to start a lesson video and find captions or a transcript.
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Complete student form
workflows.description: A student tries to complete a school form and reach a review or confirmation step.
required_actions: Complete text, select, and checkbox controls
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.
